description: Verifies M-5 / #396 — akm improve resolves relative-date expressions (`yesterday`, `3 days ago`, `last week`) in derived-memory bodies to absolute ISO dates. Asserts the relative tokens no longer appear in the post-improve bodies. (`memoryCleanup.relativeDatesResolved` is not surfaced in the public envelope as of 0.8.0, so we verify the on-disk mutation directly.)
